shortcomings: No explicit HTML/CSS/JavaScript experience or frontend frameworks (React, Angular, Vue) listed anywhere in Technical Skills or Projects.
Project Experience and Work Experience focus on backend, ML, and cloud/infrastructure rather than web UI or client-facing websites.
No evidence of frontend-backend data exchange in a web context (mentions API Gateway/Lambda but not frontend API integration, fetch/axios, or GraphQL).
No design/UI collaboration experience or explicit work with design teams on frontend visuals.
Lack of frontend-specific deliverables (web pages, dashboards, responsive components) or frontend testing (Jest, Cypress, Playwright) in Projects/Experience.
No explicit remote/contractor work experience; resume shows full-time roles at Accenture with a location rather than remote engagements.
Education shows an upcoming MS (May 2026) which could raise questions about immediate availability for a contractor role.
Portfolio links are provided but there is no narrative tying them to web frontend work; the portfolio content appears AI/ML-centric rather than web UI-focused.
experience_gaps: No demonstrated experience building or maintaining client-facing websites or web applications.
No evidence of frontend-backend data exchange in production (e.g., integrating APIs with a React/Vue app).
No specific frontend test coverage or QA practices for UI.
Insufficient emphasis on collaborating with design teams for UI/UX improvements.
weak_sections: Lacks a professional summary/objective at top to frame frontend/remote developer intent.
Projects are heavily AI/ML oriented with no clear web UI deliverables; the 'Project Experience' section could be reframed to emphasize any web-facing work or dashboards.
Education entries include an upcoming degree; unclear availability for immediate contractor role.
Portfolio/Links exist but no narrative tying them to web development.
overall_assessment: Overall, the candidate demonstrates strong AI/ML and backend/cloud engineering capabilities but shows a poor fit for a frontend-focused Web Developer contractor role as described. To improve, the resume should highlight any frontend work (HTML/CSS/JavaScript, React, responsive UI, frontend testing), collaborative design work, and concrete web deliverables. If targeting frontend roles, add a dedicated frontend section with relevant projects and metrics.
